# Layout Props

布局容器、栅格、列表、分割和尺寸控制组件。 共 16 个组件。字段细节以 `packages/core/src/types/*.ts` 为准。

## Card

Source: `packages/core/src/types/card.ts` · Interface: `CardProps`.

Showing 3 key props of 5; see source for the complete interface.

| Prop         | Type          | Default     | Notes                                              |
| ------------ | ------------- | ----------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `variant?`   | `CardVariant` | `'default'` | Card variant style                                 |
| `size?`      | `CardSize`    | `'md'`      | Card size (affects padding)                        |
| `hoverable?` | `boolean`     | `false`     | Whether the card is hoverable (shows hover effect) |

## Carousel

Source: `packages/core/src/types/carousel.ts` · Interface: `CarouselProps`.

Showing 3 key props of 13; see source for the complete interface.

| Prop             | Type      | Default | Notes                                       |
| ---------------- | --------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `autoplay?`      | `boolean` | `false` | Whether to enable automatic slide switching |
| `autoplaySpeed?` | `number`  | `3000`  | Time interval for auto-play in milliseconds |
| `dots?`          | `boolean` | `true`  | Whether to show navigation dots             |

Source: `packages/core/src/types/container.ts` · Interface: `ContainerProps`.

| Prop        | Type                | Default | Notes                                                                                      |
| ----------- | ------------------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `maxWidth?` | `ContainerMaxWidth` | `false` | Maximum width constraint for the container - 'sm': max-w-screen-sm (640px) - 'md': max-... |
| `center?`   | `boolean`           | `true`  | Whether to center the container horizontally                                               |
| `padding?`  | `boolean`           | `true`  | Whether to add horizontal padding                                                          |

## Splitter

Source: `packages/core/src/types/splitter.ts` · Interface: `SplitterProps`.

Showing 3 key props of 8; see source for the complete interface.

| Prop         | Type             | Default        | Notes                                                                       |
| ------------ | ---------------- | -------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `direction?` | `SplitDirection` | `'horizontal'` | Direction of the split                                                      |
| `sizes?`     | `number[]`       | `-`            | Initial sizes of each pane in pixels. If not provided, panes split equally. |
